title: Scott Sefton
compiled_truth: Scott Sefton is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1998-11-30 to 2001-06-01), Scott Sefton sent 22 and received 203 emails, totalling 225 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (10), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (8), [Ryan Siurek](people/ryan-siurek) (7), [Julia Murray](people/julia-murray) (5), [Mary Cook](people/mary-cook) (5).
